case_title: SHUI YUK CHAN et al VS. SHI YEE KWONG et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, SHI YEE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JASON KWONG'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS IN GOOD FAITH SHOWING FRAUD, MALICE OR OPPRESSION; AND TO ALLEGE CONTRACT PROVIDING FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JASON KWONG'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE HOUSING COURT, TO BE HEARD ON JUNE 17, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. MOVING PARTY IS INSTRUCTED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 24, 2013. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JASON KWONG's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts in good faith showing fraud, malice or oppression; and to allege contract providing for attorney's fees. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Continued To Jun-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JASON KWONG's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on June 17, 2013 at 9:30 am. Moving party is instructed to provide a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 24, 2013. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
